parsed_output.justification: Based on the transcript, James clearly identifies himself as the Hunter—a town role—and is thus not a werewolf. Justin appears to become a Seeker after swapping with Alvin, confirming a town role, while Alvin ends with a Robber role after the swap, which is also a town role. This leaves only one unverified player in the group—Mitchell—making it the most likely suspect to hold a Werewolf card that might have survived in one of the centre cards. Eliminating Mitchell therefore is the most probable step toward prompting the death of a werewolf or, if there is none, ensuring a clear outcome.
